# Multiplication → Absolute Square and Accumulate

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Multiplication → Absolute Square and Accumulate

Absolute Square and Accumulate

Instruction Type and Width           Instruction description
                                     Performs complex absolute squaring and accumulation. Each
Vector Complex Absolute Square and
                                     complex source is 32-bits wide (16-bit real and 16-bit imaginary).
Accumulate
                                     The products are accumulated with the 40-bit destination.
                                     Performs squaring of complex absolute and accumulate. Each
Vector Complex Absolute Square and
                                     complex source is 64-bits wide (32-bit real and 32-bit imaginary).
Accumulate Long
                                     The products are accumulated with the 72-bit destination.
                                     Performs complex absolute squaring and accumulation. Each
Vector Complex Absolute Square and   complex source is 32-bits wide (16-bit real and 16-bit imaginary).
Accumulate with Exponent             The second source is the exponent. The products are
                                     accumulated with the 40-bit destination.
